rationale: Replacing unmanaged Snappy/Zstd libs with managed ones for ARM64/ASLR; packaging improvement, no spec rule violated.
Socket.IOControl is Windows-only, called on Linux; platform implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Snappy DLL packaging/loading improvement for NuGet; build and packaging only, no spec rule.
NuGet compression DLLs delivered as content files causing VCS issues; packaging only, no spec rule.
ThreadStaticBuffer flag not reset after OutOfMemoryException; internal buffer management bug, no spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2386; improving reliability of SDAM heartbeat error spec tests, not fixing driver behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-2355; CI Evergreen tooling to use consistent crypt_shared and server versions.
Logging performance fix: replace interpolated strings with format strings to avoid eager rendering; no spec rule.
BsonClassMapSerializer throws NullReferenceException when DI creator returns null; internal serialization bug.
mongocryptd spawn arg parsing inserts extra '--' separator; implementation detail not defined in CSFLE spec.
GetHashCode boxing/performance improvement for BSON types; no user-visible behavior change, no spec rule.
UpdateOne with aggregation pipeline fails on OfTypeMongoCollection; C#-specific ORM feature bug, not a CRUD spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2395 + Improvement; adding spec test that reads are not retried inside transactions.
CI migration of macOS Evergreen test boxes to macOS 1100 for speed; infrastructure only.
Issue split DRIVERS-2377 + Improvement; GCP attached service account KMS support, new spec requirement not a violation.
LINQ3 throws on nullable 'as' cast if type has 'Value' property; internal LINQ translation bug.
Issue split DRIVERS-2344 + Improvement; exposing updateDescription rich field info per new spec rollout, not nonconformance.
Serverless test CI failures from DNS timing race; test timing fix, not a spec behavior issue.
C# language version upgrade from 9 to 10; build/tooling change only.
Issue split DRIVERS-1939 + Improvement; exposing $documents aggregation stage per spec rollout, not nonconformance.
Adding $dateDiff week start parameter support; new feature addition dependent on DRIVERS-1559, not a violation.
DateTimeOffset serializer should tolerate Int32/Double interchangeably on deserialization; no specific BSON spec rule.
LINQ3 fails to handle conversion to interface type in generic method Join; internal LINQ implementation bug.
LINQ3 picks wrong serializer for conditional expression result with mixed enum representations; internal LINQ bug.
Logging class/member naming refactor (plural to singular, spelling fix); no spec involvement.
Test fails on net6 because SortedSet<> moved to different assembly; test/build compatibility issue.
Bump supported maxWireVersion to 18 for MongoDB 6.1; version support update, not a nonconformance.
Issue split DRIVERS-2411 + Improvement; Azure VM managed identity KMS credentials support, new spec requirement.
Add LINQ3 untyped CreateQuery for Dynamic LINQ compatibility; C#-specific API feature, no spec rule.
Adding Azure KMS integration tests; driver-specific integration test addition, not YAML spec test infrastructure.
LINQ3 incorrect $match stage for Group/Where/Select uses $expr instead of direct field; internal LINQ translation.
LINQ3 projection deserializes ObjectId using wrong serializer; C#-specific LINQ/serializer resolution bug.
LINQ3 doesn't support cast to BsonValue in Select projection; internal LINQ implementation gap.
LINQ grouping filtered results by reference ID throws exception; internal LINQ implementation bug.
LINQ3 optimization: emit $toInt shortform instead of verbose $convert; internal translation improvement.
Issue split DRIVERS-2493 Bug; driver caches MONGODB-AWS env-var credentials indefinitely, ignoring IAM role expiration per spec.
New BsonClassMap<T> constructor accepting baseClassMap; language-binding API enhancement, no spec rule.
LINQ regression: Id property lookup fails in 2.2.x but worked in 2.1.1; internal LINQ/serialization regression.
LINQ projection bug: prefix-like field names (Name/NameOfPet) cause wrong field matching; internal LINQ implementation.
Enable AWS ECS Evergreen CI tasks now that Linux/macOS supported; CI infrastructure enablement.
LINQ3 camelCase convention creates wrong trie causing InstanceName lookup failure; internal LINQ/serialization bug.
LINQ3 DateTime.Year throws NotSupportedException on IQueryable<DateTime>; internal LINQ expression translator bug.
BsonRepresentationAttribute ignored when string[] assigned to IList<string>; C#-specific serializer dispatch bug.
LINQ expression fails for nested interface property; DiscriminatedInterfaceSerializer lacks IBsonDocumentSerializer; internal LINQ bug.
LINQ equality expression fails for RawBsonDocument collection; internal LINQ translation bug.
LINQ3 nullable enum comparison in Where filter throws; internal LINQ expression handling bug.
Failing smoke tests with no description; insufficient detail to classify.
Issue split DRIVERS-2369 Bug; spec requires causal consistency disabled in implicit sessions; driver had wrong behavior.
AWS SDK reference breaks documentation build.cake generation; docs/build tooling fix only.
GridFSDownloadStream.Flush() throws NotSupportedException; .NET Stream API contract violation, not MongoDB GridFS spec.
